trigger_condition.note: Reduction applied incrementally as N increases

sizing_rule.note: Gallacher tiered model: reduce position size by formula base_capital / (1 + 0.10 * (N - 1)) where N = number of simultaneous positions. Single position = 40k per 1000 capital; two positions = 28k; four positions = 20k. Maintains constant portfolio risk across increasing exposure complexity.

source_rule_text: Position size should be reduced as the number of simultaneous market exposures increases, maintaining constant risk control across portfolio complexity.
